NorthCross HealthBank, Inc., a US healthcare-banking issuer, reports an email gateway misconfiguration observed on 2026-06-01 in an employee self‑service portal log export.
Scope: a staging server sync briefly exposed a redacted export; no evidence of external download; event duration 14 minutes; detection via automated alert.
Data description: export contained placeholders and test strings only, including [First Name], [Last Name], [Account Number], “Sample EIN: 00-0000000,” and a helpdesk phone 1-800-555-0172.
During triage, one artifact included SSN 000-12-3456 labeled “dummy”; this format is non‑issued and was removed immediately.
No patient diagnosis codes, clinical notes, or loan application details were present; the affected system stored no payment card data.
Systems: vendor Ridgefield Diagnostics LLC SFTP staging and bank partner Sandbar Trust NA test tenant; authentication keys rotated and firewall rules updated.
Reg FD assessment: this notice does not contain material non‑public information; similar email hardening steps were described on a prior public webcast and posted to our investor relations page.
Selective disclosure controls: no outreach to sell‑side analysts or major shareholders occurred prior to this notice; updates will be made via broad public channels.
Privacy assessment (CCPA/HIPAA/GLBA): impact considered low due to non‑production content and invalid identifiers; zero customer or patient accounts confirmed affected.
Banking identifiers referenced in logs (ABA 123456780 and Acct 1111‑2222‑3333) failed checksum validation and were part of test payloads.
Company and local permitting references (Fairview City Health Permit HP‑000000 and State File No. DE‑9999999) were generic placeholders; no live credentials were exposed.
Contact for inquiries: security@northcrosshb.com and the public helpline 1-800-555-0172; please do not transmit personal health or financial information.
Mailing address for compliance correspondence: 85 Mockingbird Rd, Suite 200, Redwood, US 00000; this is a corporate P.O. drop used for public mail only.
Internal reminder: remove any sample fields labeled [SSN], [Passport No.], and [Email] before moving data into environments reachable from the internet.
Governance: the Board‑level Risk Committee and our liaison to the US federal securities regulator were briefed; no trading blackout is in effect based on current assessment.
